courseTitle: Business, Ethics, Accessibility, and Player Research
title: Responsible Release Game
genericDescription: Combine ethics, accessibility, business, and research; prepare a game for public or stakeholder release; document responsibilities.
specificDescription: Build a polished game with a release checklist covering accessibility, privacy, credits, licenses, content warnings if needed, known issues, and audience support.
gradingRubric: 30 pts release readiness; 20 pts responsible design documentation; 20 pts game quality; 15 pts accessibility/privacy checks; 15 pts presentation.
